subcodes.first_line: Your letter hath reached Us, and thy call hath been heard. God willing, mayest thou ever remain the recipient of divine favors [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب شما رسید و ندای شما شنیده شد انشاء الله لازال بعنایت حق فائز باشید و
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @consolation and comfort
